# Rober Gonzalez - Personal Portfolio

> Single-page personal portfolio for Rober Gonzalez, Senior Product Designer focused on AI products, design systems, and frontend prototyping.

## Overview

This site is a narrative-style portfolio homepage at `https://rober.design/`.
The page presents Rober's profile as animated log entries, with interactive filters to explore background, work, skills, and contact.

## Homepage Content (`/index.html`)

- Intro: Senior Product Designer based in Spain, working remotely.
- Current role: Designing AI software at Maisa AI.
- Experience: 15+ years across startups, agencies, and enterprise projects.
- Focus: AI product design, design systems, and frontend implementation.
- Leadership: Design team leadership and product strategy work.
- Contact: `hi@rober.design`, LinkedIn, and CV link.

## Interaction Model

- Animated narrative entries with staggered reveal.
- Footer filter bar: `All`, `About`, `Work`, `Skills`, `Contact`, and `CV`.
- Filter behavior dims non-matching entries and highlights matching ones.
- Clicking outside the footer resets the state to `All`.
- Inline icon assets include hover pulse and pointer-based magnetic motion (desktop pointers).

## Visual & UX Characteristics

- Dark/light theme token definitions via CSS custom properties.
- Serif-first typography for narrative tone (EB Garamond + Inter).
- Responsive layout optimized for desktop and mobile.
- Reduced-motion support via `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- Subtle global noise texture and smooth easing-based transitions.

## Technical Notes

- Stack: Vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- No frontend framework.
- Semantic structure with accessibility-minded focus styles and motion fallbacks.

## Primary Links

- Website: `https://rober.design/`
- LinkedIn: `https://www.linkedin.com/in/robergd/`
- Maisa AI: `https://maisa.ai`
- CV: `https://rober.design/cv`
- Email: `mailto:hi@rober.design`
